zh.lifeSummary: Richard Holt是John De Newton的兒子，於1200年出生在英國爾牛頓。他至少有1個兒子。他去世於1239年在英國享年39歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Richard Holt是John De Newton的儿子，于1200年出生在英国爾牛頓。他至少有1个儿子。他去世于1239年在英国享年39岁。

nameMeanings.name: Holt
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English, North German, Dutch, Danish, and Norwegian: topographic name for someone who lived in or by a small wood, from Middle English, Middle Low German, Danish, and Norwegian holt, or a habitational name from one of the many places called with this word. In England, the surname is widely distributed, but more common in Lancashire and Yorkshire than elsewhere.

variants.name: Hohlt
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Scandinavian Ordell.
North German: variant of Holt with the additional h reflecting the lengthened vowel or a variant of Hohl with the addition of excrescent -t.
Scandinavian: variant of   Holt  .

variants.name: Holten
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Scandinavian Erik, Hjalmer, Lars, Nils.

Dutch (also Van Holten) and North German: habitational name from any of the places so called, from Low German holt ‘holt, copse, small wood’. There are two in the Dutch province of Overijssel and another near Oberhausen in the Rhineland.
Danish: variant of   Holt  .

variants.name: Holtan
meanings: Norwegian: habitational name from any of numerous farmsteads so named, from the definite plural form of holt ‘small wood’ (see Holt ).

variants.name: Holter
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Scandinavian Erik, Selmer, Hilmar, Knute, Lars.
Norwegian: habitational name from any of several farmsteads in southeastern Norway, from the indefinite plural of holt ‘holt, small wood’ (see Holt ).
North German (also Hölter): habitational name for someone from any of several places in Westphalia called Hölt and Holt (see Holt ). Compare Hoelter .

variants.name: Holtman
meanings: Dutch: variant of Holt + man ‘man’.
Americanized form of German   Holtmann  .

variants.name: Holtmann
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Udo, Aloys, Hans, Heinz.
North German: variant of   Holt  .

variants.name: Holte
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Scandinavian Bjorg, Erik, Helmer, Hjalmer, Knute, Nels, Nordahl, Selmer, Swen, Thorvald.
North German: variant of   Holt  .
North German: habitational name from any of several places so named.

variants.name: Hoult
meanings: English: variant of   Holt  .

nameMeanings.name: Richard
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the most enduringly successful of the Old French personal names introduced into Britain by the Normans. It is of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from rīc ‘power’ + hard ‘strong, hardy’. It has enjoyed continuous popularity in England from the Conquest to the present day, influenced by the fact that it was borne by three kings of England, in particular Richard I ( 1157–99 ). He was king for only ten years ( 1189–99 ), most of which he spent in warfare abroad, taking part in the Third Crusade and costing the people of England considerable sums in taxes. Nevertheless, he achieved the status of a folk hero, and was never in England long enough to disappoint popular faith in his goodness and justice. He was also Duke of Aquitaine and Normandy and Count of Anjou, fiefs which he held at a time of maximum English expansion in France. His exploits as a leader of the Third Crusade earned him the nickname ‘Coeur de Lion’ or ‘Lionheart’ and a permanent place in popular imagination, in which he was even more firmly enshrined by Sir Walter Scott's novel Ivanhoe ( 1820 ).

His exploits as a leader of the Third Crusade earned him the nickname ‘Coeur de Lion’ or ‘Lionheart’ and a permanent place in popular imagination, in which he was even more firmly enshrined by Sir Walter Scott's novel Ivanhoe ( 1820 ).

historicEvents.title: Magna Carta
historicEvents.description: King John of England agreed to a charter of rights called the Magna Carta. The document was originally drafted by the Archbishop of Canterbury to establish peace between King John and a group of rebel barons. The Magna Carta was completed in 1215 and is now considered to be one of the greatest constitutional documents of all time.

historicEvents.title: France Declares War on England
historicEvents.description: France declared war on England as Louis VIII of France attacked Poitou and northern Gascony.

en.lifeSummary: Richard Holt was born in 1200, in Newton, Cheshire, England as the son of John De Newton. He had at least 1 son. He died in 1239, in England, at the age of 39.

fr.lifeSummary: Richard Holt est né en 1200, à Newton, Cheshire, Angleterre, fils de John De Newton. Il a eu au moins 1 fils. Il est décédé en 1239, à Angleterre, à l’âge de 39 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Richard Holt wurde 1200 in Newton, Cheshire, England, als Sohn von John De Newton geboren. Er hatte mindestens 1 Sohn. Er starb 1239 im Alter von 39 Jahren in England.

it.lifeSummary: Richard Holt è nato il nel 1200 nel Newton, Cheshire, England come figlio di John De Newton. Lui avuto almeno 1 figlio. Morì nel 1239, nel England, all'età di 39 anni.

ja.Newton, Cheshire, England: イギリスチェシュアイアニュートン
ja.lifeSummary: Richard Holtは1200年にイギリスチェシュアイアニュートンでJohn De Newtonの息子として生まれた。彼は少なくとも1人の息子をもうけた。彼は1239年にイギリスで39歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Richard Holt(은)는 1200년 영국 체실르 뉴턴에서 John De Newton의 아들로 태어났다. 그는 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1239년 영국에서 39세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Richard Holt nasceu em 1200, em Newton, Cheshire, Inglaterra filho de John De Newton. Ele teve pelo menos 1 filho. Ele faleceu em 1239, em Inglaterra, com 39 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Richard Holt родился в 1200 г. в местности нютон, чешир, Англия. Его отца звали John De Newton. У него был по крайней мере 1 сын. Он умер в 1239 г. в местности Англия в возрасте 39 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Richard Holt nació en 1200, en Newton, Cheshire, Inglaterra como hijo de John De Newton. Tuvo por lo menos 1 hijo. Murió en 1239, en Inglaterra, a la edad de 39 años.
